The generator creates infra chaos scenarios per service from this list — only for components the service really has. Valid component names: ecs-fargate, aurora-global, rds-proxy, elasticache, kafka-broker, sqs, sns, lambda, eventbridge, s3, api-gateway, nlb, alb, route53, secrets-manager, parameter-store, kms, dynamodb.
